title: U.S. and Iran exchange taunts as attacks imperil fragile ceasefire
summary_full: Iran’s foreign minister warned the U.S. should be wary of being dragged into a “quagmire” after tensions flared in the Strait of Hormuz.
summary_public: Iran’s foreign minister warned the U.S. should be wary of being dragged into a “quagmire” after tensions flared in the Strait of Hormuz.
